title: Meta delays release of new AI, weighs licensing Google's Gemini after disappointing trial runs: report
description: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta is reportedly delaying the release of its next artificial intelligence model at least about two months after internal tests showed the tech falling short of rival models from Google, OpenAI and Anthropic.

title: Goa Aims to Launch AI Policy in 100 Days, Says IT Minister Rohan Khaunte
description: The Goa government is set to unveil its Artificial Intelligence Policy within 100 days, as announced by IT Minister Rohan Khaunte in the legislative assembly. The policy includes integrating AI in schools and developing an AI readiness index for departments.

description: With xAI now in the hands of SpaceX, Elon Musk says he's rebuilding the artificial intelligence company following high-level departures.

title: AIS outlines targets for upcoming Clicx Bank

title: Europe takes first step to banning AI-generated child sexual abuse images
description: Europe on Friday took the first step towards outlawing artificial ​intelligence practices which generate child sexual ‌abuse material after EU governments proposed to add this provision to the bloc's landmark AI rules adopted ​two years ago.
